steps.title: Identify the grammatical relationship
steps.content: The blank separates the infinitive “to select” from “which sites to add next to the growing registry,” which serves as its direct object.

steps.title: Apply the punctuation rule
steps.content: No punctuation is placed between an infinitive and its direct object. Choices A (semicolon), B (colon), and C (comma) all incorrectly insert punctuation in this position. That matches choice D — D is correct.
